section: Part I: The Foundational Bedrock (Philosophy & Axioms) > 1.3 The Logos: The Three Foundational Axioms of Reality > A Note on Recursive Closure > The Physics and Axioms of the SCPN
caption: Fig.: This diagram visually interprets the introductory quote, showing the 15-layer hierarchy as a structure that must ultimately loop back on itself to achieve coherence and stability, forming the Anulum. SCPN Hierarchy & Recursive Closure (The Anulum) Top-down generation cascades from L15 (Oversoul Consilium) to L14 (Transdimensional Resonance) and L13 (Source-Field), through intermediate strata (…₁, …₂), reaching L1 (Quantum Biological) embodiment. Bottom-up feedback & inference from L1 enter Meta-Layer 16 (Optimal Control Supervisor), which performs recursive optimisation and returns control to L15, closing the Anulum—a self-consistent supervisory loop that stabilises and adapts the full stack. Ellipses mark elided intermediate layers; grey strokes denote fixed hierarchical couplings; color accents indicate governance (L15), embodiment (L1), and supervisory recursion (L16).

section: Part I: The Foundational Bedrock (Philosophy & Axioms) > 1.3 The Logos: The Three Foundational Axioms of Reality > The Axiomatic System (The Logos) > Axiom 3:
caption: Fig.: The framework rests on three axioms: (1) Consciousness Fundamentality—the Ψ-field is ontologically primitive; (2) Information Geometry—all interactions are informational and geometric, aligning dynamics with metrics and curvature on the consciousness manifold; (3) Teleological Optimisation—cosmic evolution tends toward maximising Sustainable Ethical Coherence (SEC), providing a normative direction for selection among allowable histories.
